# `draw.path`

> **Stability:** stable
> **Since:** 0.3
> **Bucket:** `polylines`
> **Wire kind:** `path`

Draw an OPEN polyline through N world anchors. Distinct from
`draw.polyline` (Task 6) which is CLOSED — `path` does NOT
auto-connect the last anchor back to the first. Use
`opts.closed === true` to override and close the path explicitly.
Supply 2..20 anchors (validator pins this range, mirroring
invinite's 20-point cap).

## Anchors

`anchors` — `ReadonlyArray<WorldPoint>` of length 2..20

Anchor count: 2..20.

## Signature

```ts
function path(anchors: ReadonlyArray<WorldPoint>, opts?: PathOpts): DrawingHandle;
```

_The leading `slotId: string` parameter is injected by the chartlang compiler at every callsite — script authors call `draw.path(...)` without it._

## Example

```ts
import { defineIndicator } from "@invinite-org/chartlang-core";
    export default defineIndicator({
        name: "draw.path demo",
        apiVersion: 1,
        compute({ bar, draw }) {
            draw.path(
                [
                    { time: bar.time, price: bar.open },
                    { time: bar.time, price: bar.close },
                ],
                { color: "#3b82f6", lineWidth: 2 },
            );
        },
    });
```
